name: Necrotic Gala
descriptionTemplate:
[{Devour}: The Crit. Rate of this Exalt +[Arg2]%. Gain [Power:Arg1] {STR}.]
Deal [Damage:Arg3] DMG to the enemy with lowest HP. This DMG enjoys [Arg4]% {STR} bonus. For every 1% HP the target is missing, the Final DMG of this Exalt +3%.
If there are 3 stacks of {Corpse}, Doresain eats them all to recover [Heal:Arg5] HP and double the Crit. DMG bonus of this hit.
